title: festuca incurva
intro: Festuca incurva, also known as bent grass or bent, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is native to Europe and western Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Festuca incurva include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Festuca incurva include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its use in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
